ol.li: Query Validation: QuerySpec validates types A and B.
Archetype Matching: Registry scans BitSets for component intersections.
Pointer Fetching: Direct raw pointers extracted for each matching Archetype.
Contiguous Loop: while i < len { ... } over parallel arrays.

ul.li: Cache Line Utilization: 64B L1d lines are saturated by contiguous SoA columns.
Hardware Prefetching: Sequential iteration patterns maximize L2/L3 prefetch hits.
SIMD / Auto-Vectorization: The lack of branching inside the for_each loop enables AVX-512 / Neon lane packing.
Pointer Aliasing: column_mut vs column uses restrict pointers to assist LLVM optimization.
